channel.title: STG - Paramount Theatre
channel.description: Upcoming events for STG - Paramount Theatre

item.title: PC Michael McIntyre
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Paramount Theatre Loge, 911 Pine St, Seattle, WA

item.title: Michael McIntyre: Hello America!
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Paramount Theatre, 911 Pine St, Seattle, WA

The Paramount Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 911 Pine Street, Seattle, WA 98101. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. 12+ recommended age limit. TM+ Resale has been disabled. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

Event details
